hero_h1_span: Effective and precise solutions for the nuclear industry
hero_p: We execute non-standard orders for the nuclear industry, hospitals and laboratories. Our 25 years of experience helps us select the right solutions, and our team's realisations can be found in laboratories and medical facilities across Poland and Europe.
hero_sub: We also offer machining services and production of lead and zinc castings.
about_p1: PROSZ-MET Sp. z o.o. is a Polish industrial enterprise based in Trzebinia (Lesser Poland), operating since 2001.
about_p2: We specialise in casting lead and its alloys, zinc and its alloys, production of radiological shielding and machining. We are open to individual, non-standard orders.
offer_card1_p: Precision casting of lead, including low-activity lead, and its alloys. Serial and individual orders per customer documentation.
offer_card2_p: Lead radiological shielding for X-ray rooms, nuclear medicine and the nuclear industry. We also use low-activity lead.
offer_card3_p: Precision turning, milling and grinding on modern CNC and conventional machines.
offer_card4_p: Sacrificial anodes for cathodic protection of metal structures and installations in aquatic environments. Ships, port and submarine installations.
offer_card5_p: Lead ballast is part of a yacht hull designed to lower the centre of gravity and increase resistance to heeling. Produced to individual specifications.
offer_card6_p: Shielding containers for nuclear technology, radiopharmaceuticals and radioactive waste.
offer_card7_p: Milling of customer-supplied materials including ferroalloys. Specialised in milling of explosive materials and production of aluminium-magnesium powder for military use.
offer_card8_p: Individual projects to customer specifications. Technical consultations and material selection included.
projects_p: Selected projects for clients from Poland and abroad. Each realisation combines engineering precision and experience.
project1_desc: Complete shielding set for a radiation detector with transport trolley, positioning table and lead housing. Nuclear medicine sector.
project2_desc: Lead bricks with dovetail joints for tight protective partitions. Nuclear industry, medicine, laboratories. Also available in low-activity lead.
project3_desc: Precisely manufactured lead sieve for a reactor per strict technical documentation from the nuclear energy sector.
project4_desc: Lead plates and shields for a linear accelerator. Individual execution with full documentation meeting radiation standards.
project5_desc: Container 530x530 mm, height 250 mm, stainless steel housing, lined with 6 mm lead sheet. For radioactive waste storage. Completed for a French laboratory.
project6_desc: Containers for radiopharmaceuticals used in medical diagnostics with special radiological protection.
project7_desc: Mobile lead screens to protect medical and laboratory personnel from radiation.
project8_desc: Specialist baskets for safe storage and transport of radioactive waste per nuclear safety standards.
project9_desc: Zinc and aluminium anodes for the electrochemical and marine industry. Vessel after refit with Prosz-Met anodes installed.
bricks_desc: Available in full range. Non-standard sizes and low-activity lead also possible – contact our Sales Department.

footer_about_p: Radiological shielding production, lead and zinc casting, machining. Trzebinia, Lesser Poland. Follow our projects on Facebook.
